site.name: Apple Hill Tennis Club
site.tagline: Nestled in the Green Mountains of West Dover, Vermont

hero.heading: Apple Hill Tennis Club
hero.subheading: Nestled in the Green Mountains of West Dover, Vermont
hero.description: We are a member-run club of tennis lovers, nestled in the Green Mountains of West Dover, VT. We welcome new members — both local residents and visitors.

welcome.heading: Welcome to Apple Hill
welcome.text: Whether you're a year-round Vermonter or visiting the Mount Snow area for the season, there is always a place for you at Apple Hill in our welcoming community. Come enjoy our beautiful red clay courts surrounded by the stunning Green Mountain landscape.

highlights.title: Two Red Clay Courts
highlights.description: Play on beautifully maintained red clay courts with mountain views.

highlights.title: Memorial Day to October
highlights.description: Our season typically runs from Memorial Day weekend through mid-October, weather permitting.

highlights.title: Community & Friends
highlights.description: A member-run club established 25 years ago as a place to enjoy tennis with friends.

history.heading: Our Story
history.text: Apple Hill Tennis Club was established 25 years ago as a place to enjoy tennis with friends. That founding principle continues to define our community today. What began as a small group of tennis enthusiasts has grown into a vibrant club that welcomes players of all levels.

facilities.heading: Our Facilities
facilities.text: The club features two beautifully maintained red clay courts and a small clubhouse perfect for socializing before and after play. Nestled off Upper Handle Road and Apple Hill Lane near Mount Snow, our courts offer a serene setting surrounded by the beauty of the Green Mountains.

season.heading: Playing Season
season.text: Our season typically opens around Memorial Day weekend and runs through mid-October, depending on weather conditions. The Vermont summer provides ideal playing conditions with cool mountain breezes and long, beautiful days on the court.

location.heading: Find Us
location.address: Apple Hill Lane, West Dover, VT
location.description: Located off Upper Handle Road and Apple Hill Lane at Mount Snow in West Dover, Vermont.

hero.heading: Join Our Club
hero.description: We welcome new members to join our club! There are a variety of ways to participate in Apple Hill.

contact.heading: Ready to Join?
contact.text: For membership inquiries and payment options, please contact us.

footer.tagline: A member-run club of tennis lovers in the Green Mountains.
